content: ##Hugo 윈도우 11 실행법 $ Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope CurrentUser $ irm get.scoop.sh | iex $ scoop install hugo-extended $ git clone https://github.com/pabloloveshot/pabloloveshot.github.io $ hugo –mintify
